title: MikroTik DDQ+DA0001 - QSFP-DD DAC cable, 3 m
description: A 3 m direct-attach metallic cable for high-speed network connectivity (up to 400 Gb/s) with integrated QSFP-DD modules. Its short length makes it suitable for connecting devices over short distances, for example between racks in server rooms. The integrated QSFP-DD modules are backward compatible with QSFP modules = QSFP+ (40 Gbit/s), QSFP28 (100 Gbit/s) and QSFP56 (200 Gbit/s)
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP-DD Transmission speed 400, 40 Gbps, 100 Gbps, 200 Gbps AOC/DAC cable type Passive Physical characteristics Length [m] 3
